name: seng513-202601-pg-40
description: To make it easy for you to get started with GitLab, here's a list of recommended next steps.

scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w shared && npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,server,client -c auto "npm run dev -w shared" "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
